text:
INCIDENT REPORT #009
Facility: Plant 7 - Baton Rouge
Asset: Centrifugal Compressor C-22
Severity: CRITICAL

DESCRIPTION
On the shift of record, operators observed a sharp rise in vibration amplitude
on the Centrifugal Compressor C-22. The unit was taken offline for inspection. Estimated downtime: 12.4 hours.

ROOT CAUSE
Root cause was determined to be bearing wear beyond tolerance.

CORRECTIVE ACTION
Replacement parts ordered and repair scheduled.
